segments.script_text: Bienvenidos reptiles a otro venenoso episodio de Culebrisa.
Hoy: mexicana en el Top 5 del Draft WNBA, México exige justicia al ICE, y un empresario prófugo atrapado en Florida.

Gabriela Jáquez hace historia: la mexicana fue seleccionada en el quinto lugar del Draft WNBA 2026 tras ser campeona con UCLA Bruins. El talento nacional ya desliza en la élite del basquetbol femenil.

news_source.title: Gabriela Jáquez hace historia: mexicana es elegida en el Top 5 del Draft de la NBA Femenil

prompts.image: A triumphant anthropomorphic green serpent basketball player wearing a UCLA Bruins jersey with scale patterns, holding a glowing golden basketball trophy high above her head on a dramatic arena court with snake-scale flooring. The crowd is filled with hundreds of cheering serpents of various species waving pennants, lit by bright stadium lights with confetti raining down in green and gold. Semi-realistic style, vertical 9:16 format, vibrant cinematic lighting.
prompts.video: An elegant anthropomorphic serpent in a sleek WNBA draft suit with iridescent scale patterns stands at a glowing podium shaped like a coiled cobra, holding up a jersey with the number 5 as league officials (distinguished elder serpents in suits) shake her hand. A massive screen behind her displays her name in golden letters surrounded by snake motifs, the audience of reptilian fans erupts in celebration under dramatic spotlights. Semi-realistic, cinematic, vertical 9:16 format, vibrant greens and golds.

segments.script_text: México exige acciones inmediatas a EE.UU. tras la muerte de otro ciudadano bajo custodia del ICE en Luisiana. La Cancillería advierte fallas graves en el sistema migratorio estadounidense.

news_source.title: México exige a EE.UU. "acciones inmediatas" tras la muerte de otro ciudadano bajo custodia del ICE

prompts.image: A somber scene inside a cold, dimly lit detention facility with barred walls textured like rough scales, where a small huddled group of immigrant serpents in tattered clothing sit behind iron-wrought gates shaped like intertwined snakes. A lone Mexican-flag-patterned serpent official in a diplomatic coat presses a hand against the glass in anguish, dramatic low-key lighting casting harsh shadows. Semi-realistic style, dark muted tones with flashes of red and green, vertical 9:16 format.
prompts.video: A fierce anthropomorphic serpent diplomat wearing a sash with the Mexican serpent-eagle emblem slams a scaled fist on an ornate negotiation table in a grand hall with ondulating architecture, facing a row of stern American eagle-serpent hybrid officials across the table. Documents stamped with serpent-seal insignias scatter in the air, the tension is palpable under cold blue diplomatic lighting with the flags of both nations — reimagined with serpent motifs — standing on either side. Semi-realistic, cinematic drama, vertical 9:16 format.

segments.script_text: Rafael Zaga Tawil, prófugo acusado de defraudar 5 mil millones al Infonavit, fue capturado en Florida por el ICE. Años escondido, pero la madriguera siempre se encuentra.

news_source.title: Detienen en EU a Rafael Zaga Tawil, empresario acusado de fraude millonario al Infonavit

prompts.image: A slick, well-dressed anthropomorphic viper in an expensive pin-striped suit covered in golden scale patterns is caught mid-flee, dramatically frozen as law enforcement serpents in tactical gear and badges shaped like coiled snakes surround him at a sun-drenched US border checkpoint with serpentine architecture. Piles of scattered currency — bills featuring serpent faces and coins engraved with scales — spill from his briefcase onto the ground. Semi-realistic style, harsh midday cinematic lighting, vibrant and dramatic, vertical 9:16 format.
prompts.video: The same slick viper businessman is now shown in handcuffs made of interlinked snake links, being escorted by US and Mexican reptilian federal agents down a courthouse corridor with scale-patterned marble walls. Behind him, a giant projected headline in a snake-news broadcast shows his face alongside the number '5,000,000,000 pesos' surrounded by broken Infonavit logos redesigned as serpent coil emblems, while crowds of worker serpents outside cheer through the windows. Semi-realistic, cinematic golden and shadow tones, vertical 9:16 format.

segments.script_text: Eso fue todo reptiles, nos vemos mañana. Sigan deslizándose.
